back_translation: A Psalm of Asaph. God stands as president in the assembly of God; He judges among the gods.
'How long will you judge unjustly and show partiality to the wicked? Selah
Give justice to the weak and the fatherless; uphold the rights of the afflicted and the oppressed.
Rescue the weak and the needy; save them from the hand of the wicked.'
They do not know or understand; they wander in darkness; all the foundations of the earth are shaken.
I have said, 'You are gods; all of you are sons of the Most High.'
But you will die like ordinary men, and you will fall like any other ruler.'
Arise, O God, judge the earth, for all the nations are Your inheritance.
